{{Infobox location
| name = Everwood continent
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Everwood]] continent is a vast landmass ruled by [[Emriss Silentborn]], the [[Remnant]] [[Monarch]] and [[Queen]] of the continent. Known for her soothing presence, Emriss is a former men’hla tree who dedicated her [[life]] to the advancement of civilization and the democratization of education. The continent is notable for its unique relationship with men’hla trees, which are considered sacred and serve as a vital resource for [[Soulsmiths]] because their leaves can produce [[Remnants]]. The geography of the region includes diverse environments, such as the jungles where the [[Silent King]] resides and the [[Desolate Wilds]], which features twisted black and green trees. The continent's stability is heavily influenced by the power and preparations of its [[Monarch]], as she stands against threats like the [[Silent King]]. [[Traveling]] to [[Everwood]] is difficult due to its distance, often requiring the use of the [[labyrinth]] to traverse space.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Everwood continent]] is a location.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A rogue black [[dragon]] was tracked to the [[Everwood continent]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Everwood]] Continent contains jungles where the [[Silent King]] resides.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Everwood continent]] is ruled by [[Emriss Silentborn]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|People from the [[Everwood continent]] are being directed toward an exit in [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] and [[Dross]] discussed their plan before arriving in the [[Everwood continent]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] has visited the [[Everwood continent]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
